hero.tagline: Take a ride in our Times Machine

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: We live for the hunt.
about.text1: Sign Of Times was born from a lifelong obsession with the rarest timepieces on earth. We travel the world to find watches that most collectors will never encounter — pieces with soul, with history, with stories no certificate can fully capture.
about.text2: Every watch we offer has been personally sourced, authenticated, and chosen because it moved us. We don't deal in volume. We deal in meaning.

collection.label: Current Selection
collection.title: Featured Timepieces
collection.subtitle: A curated selection from our current collection.

gone.label: Gone Too Soon
gone.title: These ones got away.
gone.desc: Every piece here found its home. A reminder of what moves through our hands.

wishlist.label: Miss Your Dream Timepiece?
wishlist.title: We'll find it for you.
wishlist.desc: Tell us what you're looking for. We search so you don't have to.

trade.label: Want an Upgrade or Trade?
trade.title: Let's make a deal.
trade.desc: Buying, selling, or trading — we're here to help you move up.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Enquire about a piece
contact.subtitle: Whether buying, selling, or trading — we're here to help.
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us about the piece you're interested in...
